  <h2 id="lecture_heading" class="section-title dsp-flex-xs flex-align-items-center-xs" data-lecture-id="14159984" data-next-lecture-id="14160014" data-lecture-url="/courses/465756/lectures/14159984" data-next-lecture-url="/courses/465756/lectures/14160014" ,="" data-previous-lecture-url="/courses/465756/lectures/14159583" data-previous-lecture-id="14159583">

      </svg>
     
    17. Day 6: The Alter-Ego You Need To Create
</h2>

  <!-- Attachment Blocks -->
<!-- DEBUG: attachments.count=1 -->

  <!-- DEBUG: attachment.id=28213764, kind=text -->
  <div class="lecture-attachment lecture-attachment-type-text" id="lecture-attachment-28213764">
    <div class="attachment-data"></div>
    
      <div class="attachment-data"></div>
<div class="lecture-text-container">
<p></p><h2>Explain this to your friend: </h2><p>"One of the challenges of living in a society is wanting to fit in. You need to develop an alter-ego that can protect your message from this natural inclination."</p><p>"You don't want to be invisible."</p><p>"These next questions are designed to remind you that a message is what will make you NOT be invisible."</p><p>"Imagine people are talking about you..." </p><blockquote><strong>1. How do they refer to you?</strong></blockquote><blockquote><strong>2. How do you want them to refer to you?</strong></blockquote><p>Make your friend complete this sentence about other people talking about them:</p><p>"That’s the girl / guy who..."</p><p>"She / He changed my mind about..."</p><p><em>Figure this out before moving on.</em></p><p><br></p><h2><strong>Who do you have to become to spread this message?</strong></h2><p>Explain to your friend:</p><p>"Finding your message is 50% inspiration and 50% just a formal decision... the decision to amplify one small part of the person you are... And doing it for the next three years of your life."</p><p>"Start to separate yourself from the full dimensional person that you are... And visualize the singular dimensional person (brand / persona / identity) that you need to show to the world as the best vehicle for your message."</p><p>"David Goggins has Goggins"</p><p>"Gary Veynerchuck has Gary V"</p><p>"Like Batman says in 'Batman Begins'... You have to become A symbol to the people."</p><p><em>FINALLY, ASK THEM: "What name would you give this new alter-ego of yours?"</em></p><p><br></p><h2><strong>Magnetic Qualities</strong></h2><p>Ask your friend: "Which ones of these magnetic qualities do you possess?"</p><p>LIST OF MAGNETIC QUALITIES:</p><p>Relatable</p><p>Mysterious</p><p>Exclusive</p><p>Forbidden</p><p>Original</p><p>Rare</p><p>Popular</p><p>Contrarian</p><p>Adrenaline</p><p><br></p><h2><strong>Build The Superhero</strong></h2><p>Ask your friend (using the name they picked for their alter-ego):</p><p>1. What is X's magic power: </p><p>3. What does X stand for? </p><p>4. What does X stand against?</p><p><br></p><p><em>Wow. You should have something powerful and exciting after today!</em></p><p></p>
</div>

    
  </div>
